title: Step
description: A single step of a route leg

html_instructions.description: Formatted instructions for this step, presented as an HTML text string.

travel_mode.description: The travel mode for this step

maneuver.description: The maneuver action for this step (e.g., turn-left, roundabout-right, merge, straight, etc.).

steps.description: Sub-steps for walking or transit legs in multi-modal routes
